sentences.arabic: فِي رِحَابِ النَّثْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ، يَقِفُ كِتَابُ "كَلِيلَةَ وَدِمْنَةَ" كَمَنَارَةٍ لِلْحِكْمَةِ الرَّمْزِيَّةِ وَالْبَصِيرَةِ السِّيَاسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: U prostranstvima arapske proze, knjiga 'Kalila i Dimna' stoji kao svjetionik simboličke mudrosti i političkog uvida.
sentences.translationEn: In the realm of Arabic prose, the book 'Kalila wa Dimna' stands as a beacon of allegorical wisdom and political insight.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ الْمُؤَلِّفُ خُرَافَاتِ الْحَيَوَانِ لِنَقْدِ التَّرَاتُبِيَّةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ وَتَعْقِيدَاتِ الْحَيَاةِ فِي الْبَلَاطِ دُونَ صِدَامٍ مُبَاشِرٍ.
sentences.translation: Autor je koristio basne o životinjama kako bi kritikovao društvenu hijerarhiju i složenost dvorskog života bez direktnog sukoba.
sentences.translationEn: The author employed animal fables to critique social hierarchies and the intricacies of courtly life without direct confrontation.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ هَذَا النَّثْرُ بِتَدَفُّقِهِ الْإِيقَاعِيِّ وَالتَّكَامُلِ السَّلِسِ لِلْحِكَمِ الْأَخْلَاقِيَّةِ ضِمْنَ الْبِنَاءِ السَّرْدِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ovu prozu karakteriše ritmični tok i glatka integracija moralnih pouka unutar narativne strukture.
sentences.translationEn: This prose is characterized by its rhythmic flow and the seamless integration of moral aphorisms within the narrative structure.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ كُلُّ حِوَارٍ بَيْنَ ابْنَيْ آوَى بَحْثًا فَلْسَفِيًّا رَفِيعًا فِي طَبِيعَةِ السُّلْطَةِ وَالْوَفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dijalog između dva šakala smatra se uzvišenim filozofskim istraživanjem prirode vlasti i odanosti.
sentences.translationEn: Each dialogue between the two jackals is considered a sophisticated philosophical inquiry into the nature of power and loyalty.

sentences.arabic: تَتَأَرْجَحُ اللُّغَةُ بَيْنَ الْبَسَاطَةِ فِي الْقَصَصِ وَالتَّعْقِيدِ الْعَمِيقِ فِي الِاسْتِعَارَاتِ الْكَامِنَةِ خَلْفَهَا.
sentences.translation: Jezik oscilira između jednostavnosti u pripovijedanju i duboke složenosti u metaforama koje leže iza njih.
sentences.translationEn: The language oscillates between simplicity in storytelling and profound complexity in the metaphors underlying them.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الثَّنَائِيَّةُ الْأُسْلُوبِيَّةُ سَمَحَتْ لِلنَّصِّ بِأَنْ يَرُوقَ لِعَامَّةِ النَّاسِ وَنُخْبَةِ الْمُفَكِّرِينَ فِي ذَلِكَ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj stilski dualitet omogućio je tekstu da se dopadne i običnom narodu i eliti mislilaca tog doba.
sentences.translationEn: This stylistic duality allowed the text to appeal to both the common folk and the elite thinkers of that era.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ دِرَاسَةَ مِثْلِ هَذِهِ الرَّوَائِعِ تَكْشِفُ عَنْ تَطَوُّرِ الْفِكْرِ الْأَدَبِيِّ الْعَرَبِيِّ وَقُدْرَتِهِ عَلَى التَّأْلِيفِ الْإِبْدَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Proučavanje ovakvih remek-djela otkriva razvoj arapske književne misli i njenu sposobnost za kreativnu sintezu.
sentences.translationEn: Studying such masterpieces reveals the evolution of Arabic literary thought and its capacity for creative synthesis.
